title: About FlyAir
heroImageAlt: Paper aeroplane circling a globe of meridian lines on a navy gradient
intro: FlyAir is the flights-focused brand in the Travellers Marketplace family — built to make booking international and domestic air travel simple, transparent and well supported, with a team that has been working in the travel industry since 2000.

sections.p:
flyair.lk is operated by Travellers Marketplace (Pvt) Ltd, a Sri Lankan company incorporated in 2019 (BR No PV 00214561). The parent group is licensed by the Sri Lanka Civil Aviation Authority (CAA licence A-1710) and is an IATA accredited travel agent, with a team whose hands-on travel experience traces back to 2000.

FlyAir sits alongside two sister brands powered by the same group: travellers.lk for full-service travel (visas, hotels, tours, transport) and Travellers Holidays for curated tour packages. The three brands share supplier relationships, payment infrastructure and customer support, so help is always close by whichever door you walk in through.

We bring hundreds of airlines into one search so you can compare full-service and low-cost carriers side by side and book at the fare that suits you. Each fare is shown with its real inclusions — baggage, change rules, refundability — so there are no surprises at the airport.

Beyond flights, our consultants can connect your booking to visa support, travel insurance, hotels, ground transport and tours, all coordinated through one team — useful when a single trip touches multiple services.
Head office: Colombo, Sri Lanka. Branches in Kandy, Nuwara Eliya and Kurunegala bring service closer to travellers across the country. International expansion to Dubai and Malaysia is on the roadmap.

Our service model is four steps: listen, plan, coordinate, support. We try to understand each traveller’s objective, budget, dates and comfort preferences before proposing options; we coordinate confirmations across suppliers; and we stay accessible before, during and after the journey.
Sri Lankan registered company (PV 00214561) · CAA licence A-1710 · IATA accredited travel agent · Industry experience since 2000 · Branches in Colombo, Kandy, Nuwara Eliya and Kurunegala.
Email info@flyair.lk or call 0788 788 788. We answer messages and calls during business hours from Sunday to Saturday and respond to emails within four working hours.
